description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story office building with a flat, gray roof and a brick exterior. The facade features a regular grid of large, rectangular window openings, all of which appear to be without glass or frames, giving the building a stark, unfinished look. The structure includes a prominent, recessed entryway with a flat canopy supported by columns, and an attached secondary block that extends from the main volume. The brickwork is uniform, with a reddish-brown and gray color palette, and the roof surfaces are smooth and unadorned. The building lacks visible signage, decorative elements, or landscaping, emphasizing a utilitarian, industrial aesthetic. The overall form is boxy and functional, with clear, repetitive architectural lines.
description: A three-story, flat-roofed office building with a brick exterior and a regular grid of window openings, featuring a recessed entry and attached secondary block.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with three stories of evenly spaced window openings and a recessed entryway with a canopy.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached secondary block and the flat roof, with fewer window openings visible on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building and the secondary block, with a continuation of the brickwork and window pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the long, uninterrupted brick facade with three rows of window openings and no visible entry.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, evenly spaced rectangular windows in a grid pattern across all visible facades.
